steps.title: Focus on the graph claim
steps.content: The underlined claim is specifically about medicine and health research topics in 2019. Supporting it requires data showing that the 2019 medicine and health number is higher than the medicine and health number in every other year.

steps.title: Use the matching data
steps.content: Choice A compares cellular and molecular biology with animal science in 2016. Choice B compares physics and space science with medicine and health only within 2019. Choice C discusses animal science. The choice naming the highest medicine and health value in 2019 directly supports the claim. The answer is D.
